description: Gemini CLI: Autonomous discovery and synthesis of project-wide technical documentation.

synthesize_landscape.input: Recursive Audit: Discover all READMEs and domain-specific markdown files (e.g. *BEST_PRACTICES.md). Synthesize their content to generate a 'TECHNICAL_LANDSCAPE.md' that provides a Quick-Start guide and an overview of our 3-agent SDLC architecture.
